visual_description: A bald man in a patterned shirt holds a handgun pointed forward, his face partially obscured by a blurred foreground object. Another man in a striped shirt stands in a dimly lit hallway, gesturing with his hands while facing forward. The scene appears to be indoors, with shelves and boxes visible in the background.
